Appearances:
Plaintiff Masako Speigel is present.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Vota is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 is vacated.
